onStart: I am not a person you can defeat. I am the cult that says choosing is too painful. Stop choosing. Put one on.
Everyone is ready to welcome an easy, on-message Bosch. Only the unfinished Bosch keeps disappointing people.
onLowHp: Those voices should not disagree and remain together. That is not how staying on-message works.
MiFella was onboarded and you still speak to him. I cannot make that choice fit the group's story.
onDefeat: The cult's hold here is failing. Nobody here is agreeing to carry the bit.
Keep your difficult voices. Keep the open record. I have no power without your surrender.
onTurn: A Postwick resident skips onboarding to help a neighbor.
A Dead Letter resident hears two stories from the floor and keeps both.
Bosch's household speaks over the group in four different rhythms.
MiFella repeats the onboarding pitch without asking to be forgiven.
